ItacPersonItem.Notes: Agostino Dolce was the author of Almida, son of Orlando Dolce and brother of Jacopo Antonio Dolce, physician. Jacopo contributed with two sonnetts to a publication of the Animosi Academy in 1575, edited by Giovanni Fratta. Agostino died very young. He should not be confused with Agostino Dolce (1561-1648). On Dolce brothers, see Cicogna, Delle iscrizioni veneziane, vol. IV, pp. 92-93. L`Almida was performed in 1593 by the Riuniti Academy.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
